storage.object.providerCode.desc: Configured object-storage provider code used by this object
storage.object.providerType.desc: Object-storage platform type used by this object
storage.object.objectKey.desc: Unique object key in the remote store
storage.object.eTag.desc: Checksum tag returned by object storage
storage.object.sourceService.desc: Service name that uploaded the object
storage.quota.tenantId.desc: Tenant identifier that owns this quota
storage.quota.quotaBytes.desc: Maximum storage bytes available to the tenant; empty means unlimited
storage.quota.description.desc: Additional notes about the tenant quota
storage.page.title: Object Storage
storage.page.noProviders: No object-storage provider is enabled. Configure at least one provider in application properties first.
